section.heading: Mental health services for members of the reserve components of the Armed Forces

content.p: The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of Defense, may furnish mental health services to members of the reserve components of the Armed Forces.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title VII, § 763(a), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 3725.)
